findings.title: Password hashing uses fast, unsalted SHA-256 instead of an approved password KDF
Password credential comparison is not constant-time
Reset tokens are not consumed after verification

reasoning: All repository files were inspected. The reset route has a limiter mounted before it, uses a generic response, and reset tokens use randomBytes with timingSafeEqual. However, the repository contains no operation that changes a verified reset record's used flag to true, so tokens remain reusable until expiration.
